Whose public chat is that from my Sukuna bot, whoever you are.. LISTEN I DID NOT PUT FOOT FETISH ON HIS LIKES вҳ№пёҸ

Anyway,

The 700 special, this is it. Eat it up my kittens рҹҘ° 

And happy women's day (or month) for the ladies there. I love you all women, you all are my pookies, my sweeties, my Goddesses, my reason for being alive. All of you are amazing and I wish for you all to live happily ever after with me.

If I see one of down's kittens on the review section im gonna combust (pls im begging yall i didn't do anything wrong рҹҳ“рҹҳ“рҹҳӯрҹҳӯ)
